title: How to ask for a ruling - Canada.ca
content:
## How to ask for a ruling
To ask for a CPP/EI ruling, you can:
- sign in to My Business Account , if you are a payer , and select “Request a CPP/EI Ruling” under “Payroll”
- sign in to My Account , if you are a worker or a payer , and select “Request a CPP/EI Ruling”.
- ask your authorized representative to request a ruling for you – they can sign in to Represent a Client and select “Request a CPP/EI Ruling”.
- write a letter or fill out Form CPT1, Request for a CPP/EI Ruling – Employee or self-employed , and mail it to the CPP/EI Rulings Division at the tax services office in the province or territory of your residence or place of business – see Form CPT1 for the mailing addresses

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
